ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the passenger */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the passenger */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the passenger */,
  "cabin" INTEGER /* Cabin number assigned to the passenger */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the passenger */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* List of allergies */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* List of medical conditions */,
  "travel_history" TEXT /* List of previous cruises taken */,
  "embarked" INTEGER /* Embarkation port (coded as integers) */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid by the passenger */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children traveling with the passenger */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses traveling with the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_cabin FOREIGN KEY ("cabin") REFERENCES cabins ("cabin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embarked FOREIGN KEY ("embarked") REFERENCES embarkation_ports ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabins" (
  "cabin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cabin */,
  "cabin_type" TEXT /* Type of cabin (e.g., Suite, Deluxe, Standard) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum passenger capacity for the cabin */,
  "deck_number" INTEGER /* Deck number where the cabin is located */,
  "available" INTEGER /* Indicates if the cabin is currently available for booking */,
  "cabin_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the cabin */,
  "view_type" TEXT /* Type of view from the cabin */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available in the cabin */,
  "price_range" TEXT /* Price range for the cabin type */,
  "last_cleaned" TEXT /* Date when the cabin was last cleaned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cabin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "embarkation_ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the embarkation port */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the port is located */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates (latitude, longitude) of the port */,
  "facilities" TEXT /* List of facilities available at the port */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the port */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact details for the port */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fares" (
  "fare_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fare entry */,
  "cabin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cabin type to which the fare applies */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the fare */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season applicable for the fare (e.g., Summer, Winter) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date for the fare validity */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for the fare validity */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the fare */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the fare is denominated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fare_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew_members" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "crew_name" TEXT /* Full name of the crew member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the crew member (e.g., Captain, Steward, Chef) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contact */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the crew member belongs to */,
  "employment_date" TEXT /* Date when the crew member was employed */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "training_certifications" TEXT /* List of training certifications held by the crew member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "itineraries" (
  "itinerary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each itinerary */,
  "cruise_name" TEXT /* Name of the cruise */,
  "duration_days" INTEGER /* Duration of the cruise in days */,
  "starting_port" INTEGER /* Reference to the starting port */,
  "destination_port" INTEGER /* Reference to the destination port */,
  "route_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the cruise route */,
  "stops" TEXT /* List of ports where the cruise will stop */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Date when the cruise departs */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the cruise returns */,
  "passenger_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of passengers the cruise can accommodate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("itinerary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the passenger who made the booking */,
  "cabin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cabin booked */,
  "itinerary_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the itinerary chosen */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date when the booking was made */,
  "booking_status" TEXT /* Current status of the booking */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used for payment */,
  "special_requests" TEXT /* Any special requests made during booking */,
  "cancellation_date" TEXT /* Date when the booking was canceled, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_itinerary_id FOREIGN KEY ("itinerary_id") REFERENCES itineraries ("itinerary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_cabin_id FOREIGN KEY ("cabin_id") REFERENCES cabins ("cabin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, crew, manager) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access attempt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "special_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each special request */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the passenger making the request */,
  "request_description" TEXT /* Description of the special request */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the request */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of special request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "fulfillment_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was fulfilled */,
  "fulfillment_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the fulfillment process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_special_requests_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)
